description: Atlas adapter for the shared _stack Codex inbox/worktree runner.

defaultCommands: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$required = @('README.md','docs/STACK_OVERVIEW.md','docs/SYSTEM_REGISTRY.md','docs/OWNERSHIP_BOUNDARIES.md','docs/CONTRACT_MAP.md','docs/LOCAL_FIRST_WORKFLOW.md','docs/PLAYBOOK_PROMOTION_MODEL.md'); $missing = @($required | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }); if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Missing required Atlas docs: ' + ($missing -join ', ')); exit 1 }"
notes: Atlas is docs-first in this phase, so verification stays lightweight and architecture-repo appropriate.
Do not add package bootstrap or build requirements unless Atlas itself later introduces them.
Prefer updating architecture and contract-planning docs over importing workflow or implementation detail from sibling repos.

docsUpdateRules: If Atlas architecture shape or stack role changes, keep README.md, docs/STACK_OVERVIEW.md, docs/SYSTEM_REGISTRY.md, docs/OWNERSHIP_BOUNDARIES.md, and docs/LOCAL_FIRST_WORKFLOW.md aligned in the same change or immediately after.
Keep Atlas docs-first and repo-local in this phase; do not implement workflow commands, runtime logic, or governance enforcement here.
Prefer cross-links into _stack and Playbook over copying operator-command detail or implemented governance detail into Atlas.
